case_title: JOHNSON, NOEL C. VS MARTINEZ, LYDIA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, LYDIA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, NOEL C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, LYDIA $19.90 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $64.90 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEFENDANT'S CHECK FOR $64.90 WAS RETURNED TO HER WITH INFO RE: PROPER WAYS OF PAYMENT; PLS.SEE FILE
